message:
style(pager): reflow wal_is_empty computation into a single chained call

No semantic change. The
    with_wal_backend_read(&self.wal_backend, |wal| Ok(wal.frame_count()))
        .unwrap_or(0)
        == 0
block was spread across four lines with the `.unwrap_or(0)` on its
own indented line. rustfmt now keeps the
`with_wal_backend_read(...).unwrap_or(0)` call chain on a single
line, with `== 0` on the following line — matching surrounding
style for similar one-shot WAL-introspection calls in the same
function. No control-flow, allocation, or borrow change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
